title: Discover Roman ruins in Algeria by motorcycle
route: El Oued, Ouargla, Ghardaia, Boussaâda, Biskra, Batna, Constantine, Guelma, Annaba, El Tarf
inclusions: ✅ 14 nights in a double room in a 3/4/5* or better local hotel
✅ Breakfasts and dinners as per the program

itinerary.itineraryDays:
Day 1: Entry into Algeria – El Oued

➡️ Participants will be met and welcomed at the Hazoua border crossing 🇹🇳 / Taleb Larbi 🇩🇿
➡️ Our guide will handle all entry procedures smoothly and comfortably
🍽 Lunch after completing entry procedures
➡️ Departure for El Oued 🏜️
🏨 Overnight stay at the El Oued Hotel

📍 Distance: 90 km
🌙 First night

Day 2: El Oued – Ghardaia

➡️ Departure in the morning for Ghardaia 🕌
🍽️ Lunch in Ouargla
➡️ Continuation of the journey to  Ghardaia
🏨 Arrival in the evening and overnight stay at the Belvedere Hotel

📍 Distance: Approximately 450 km
🌙 Second Night

Day 3: Sightseeing Tour of Ghardaia

➡️ Visit the Ghardaia Palace and discover traditional architecture.

➡️ See authentic local clothing 👘
➡️ Stroll through the traditional market 🛍️
➡️ Learn about traditional crafts.

🍽 Lunch in the city center

🌆 Evening visit to the ancient Beni Isguen Palace
🏨 Return and overnight stay at the same hotel.

 🌙 Third Night

Day 4: Ghardaia – Boussaâda

➡️ Departure in the morning for Boussaâda 🌴
🍽️ Lunch in Laghouat
➡️ Arrival in Boussaâda in the evening.

 🖼️ Visit to the Nasreddine Dinet Museum
🏨 Overnight stay at the El-Qaid Hotel
📍 Distance: 410 km
🌙 Night 4

Day 5: Boussaâda – Batna

➡️ Tour of the Boussaâda Oasis 🌴
➡️ Departure for Batna
🍽️ Lunch in Biskra
🏞️ Visit to the El-Ghoufi Caves
🏨 Overnight stay at the Chélia Hotel
📍 Distance: 290 km
🌙 Night 5

Day 6: Timgad  Constantine

➡️ Morning: Visit the Roman site of Timgad 🏛️
🍽 Lunch near Ain M'lila
➡️ Departure for Constantine 🌉
🌆 Evening: Visit the suspension bridges
🏨 Overnight stay at the Khayyam Hotel
📍 Distance: Approximately 250 km
🌙 Night 6

Day 7: Constantine - Guelma

➡️ Departure for Guelma
♨️ Visit to Hammam Debagh
🍽 Lunch near Hammam Debagh
🏛️ Visit to the Roman Theatre
🏨 Overnight stay at the Ben Messahel Hotel
📍 Distance: 110 km
🌙 Night  Seventh

Day 8: Guelma – El Tarf – Departure

➡️ Heading towards El Tarf via Annaba 🌴
⛪ Visiting the famous church in Annaba.

🍽️ Lunch in El Kala 🐟
➡️ Arriving at the Oum Teboul border crossing
➡️ Our guide will handle all departure procedures.

📍 Distance: 170 km

description: Let's explore the Roman and Byzantine ruins together
